globals.name: Automation
globals.description: Defines the entrypoint for one automation activation. The name must match the saved definition name when the automation is started.

fields.name: targets
fields.description: Default target set. Omit or use None() when targets are resolved inside the callback.

params.name: fn
params.description: Callback executed when the activation fires.

globals.name: Entity
globals.description: Creates an entity trigger or target spec that matches one exact entity key.

params.name: key
params.description: Full entity key such as plugin.device.entity.

globals.name: Query
globals.description: Creates a query-backed trigger or target spec. Queries are re-resolved at fire time.

params.name: query
params.description: Storage search key pattern or filter query.

globals.name: None
globals.description: Creates an empty target spec for automations that resolve targets inside the callback.

globals.name: Interval
globals.description: Creates an interval trigger. The runtime clamps intervals below 50ms to 50ms.

params.name: min
params.description: Minimum interval in seconds when using a range.

params.name: max
params.description: Maximum interval in seconds when using a range.

context_methods.name: targets:each
context_methods.description: Iterates the current target entities for the activation firing.

context_methods.name: ctx.send
context_methods.description: Publishes a command subject for the given entity.

context_methods.name: ctx.query
context_methods.description: Resolves entities from storage inside the callback.

params.name: query
params.description: Storage search key pattern or filter query.

context_methods.name: ctx.queryOne
context_methods.description: Returns the first entity matching the query or nil.

params.name: query
params.description: Storage search key pattern or filter query.

context_methods.name: ctx.after
context_methods.description: Schedules a one-shot timer owned by the activation.

context_methods.name: ctx.every
context_methods.description: Schedules a repeating timer owned by the activation.

context_methods.name: ctx.cancel
context_methods.description: Cancels a timer created by ctx.after or ctx.every.

params.name: timer_id
params.description: Timer identifier previously returned by ctx.after or ctx.every.
